shortDescription: Spot matching bull heads across 200 puzzle stages — 35 unique bull animations and relaxed brain-teasing fun.
about: Find the Bull is a observation puzzle built around spotting and matching bull-head patterns. With 200 handcrafted levels and 35 distinct bull animations, each stage rewards careful looking and steady progress through playful, colorful art.
story: Train your eye level by level — from easy warm-ups to tricky layouts that test focus and patience.
howToPlay: Study the board and the bull patterns shown.
Find and match the correct bull head for each stage.
Clear levels to unlock the next challenge.
Stay sharp — later stages introduce trickier layouts.

company.companyDescription: Publisher of observation and logic puzzles — focused on handcrafted levels, playful art, and accessible brain-training games for all ages.

shortDescription: Hold the line in a stage-based tower defense — deploy heroes and weather wave after wave of enemy assaults.

Upgrade units to handle tougher enemies.
Use terrain and range to your advantage.
Clear every wave to advance to the next stage.

company.companyDescription: Strategy game publisher specializing in tower defense and wave-based combat — built for players who enjoy tactical placement and steady progression.

shortDescription: Sort colorful beans by hue and place every bean on its matching color to clear each clever logic stage.
about: Bean Sort Puzzle is a satisfying color-sorting brain teaser. Separate beans by color, plan your moves, and make sure every piece lands on the right palette before the board locks up.

features: Clear visual feedback on every move
Stages that ramp up in complexity

Ensure each bean ends on its matching color zone.
Plan ahead — limited space makes order matter.
Complete the layout to finish the level.

company.companyDescription: Indie studio behind color-sorting and logic puzzles — clean visuals, satisfying mechanics, and levels designed to reward careful planning.

shortDescription: English-language block dropping action — clear lines, chain combos, and chase high scores in a modern Tetris-style challenge.
about: Block Blast delivers classic falling-block puzzle gameplay with a polished English interface. Drop shapes, complete lines, and push for bigger combos as stages climb in speed and pressure.
story: Every line you clear buys breathing room — miss your openings and the stack wins.

Chain multiple clears for bonus points.
